sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62752" key="leukoflegmatw/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λευκοφλεγμᾰτ-ώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n62752.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">affected with dropsy</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0627.tlg006.perseus-grc1:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
